devdoc.details: Design principles:  - Zero contract deployments per market. Ever.  - `questionId` is the only on-chain key: keccak256(abi.encodePacked(ipfsCid)).  - The ipfsCid is emitted in events only — not stored in contract storage.  - A subgraph can reconstruct full market state from MarketCreated + adapter events.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

MarketCreated(bytes32,string,uint256,uin.details: Indexed on questionId. A subgraph detects this and fetches ipfsCid to get metadata.

params.creator: Address that called createMarket()
params.ipfsCid: IPFS CID of the metadata JSON (NOT stored on-chain)

createMarket(string,uint256,uint256,uint.details: Steps:   1. Derive questionId from the IPFS CID.   2. Register market metadata in local storage (no strings, only primitives).   3. Call adapter.initializeMarket() → CTF prepareCondition + CRE event trigger.   4. Emit MarketCreated so the subgraph / frontend can index it.

params.ipfsCid: IPFS CID of the metadata JSON (format: "Qm..." or "bafy...").
params.outcomeCount: Number of outcome slots (2 for binary YES/NO).
params.resolutionTime: Unix timestamp when Chainlink CRE should resolve. Must be in the future.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

syncStatus(bytes32).details: The adapter emits MarketResolved; a keeper or the finalizer can call this.      Alternatively, the frontend reads status directly from the adapter.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: MarketRegistry

MarketCreated(bytes32,string,uint256,uin.notice: Emitted when a new market is created.

allMarkets(uint256).notice: Ordered list of all questionIds for enumeration

createMarket(string,uint256,uint256,uint.notice: Creates a new prediction market in a single transaction.

getMarketsPage(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns a page of market questionIds for frontend pagination.

syncStatus(bytes32).notice: Syncs the registry status when the adapter resolves a market.

userdoc.notice: Lightweight on-chain registry for CTF prediction markets.
